scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet meets Aws and Khazraj, leaders of the two tribes.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Prophet shaking hands with Aws and Khazraj

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 109
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of unity and friendship in spreading the message of Islam

characters.name: the central figure
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Aws
characters.appearance: medium build, young man, wearing a simple white thobe and a red woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Khazraj
characters.appearance: slender build, young man, wearing a simple white thobe and a blue woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad met with Aws and Khazraj, leaders of the two tribes, in ʿAqabah, marking a significant step towards unity and the spread of Islam.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A scenic ʿAqabah landscape with rugged rocky terrain and sparse vegetation. Late afternoon sunlight casts warm shadows across the scene, with a few scattered palm trees providing shade. In the center, three figures stand facing each other in a gesture of friendship and unity. On the left, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, extending one hand in a warm handshake. In the middle, a tall, slender young man with a red woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering, standing with his right hand outstretched in a firm handshake. On the right, a slightly younger young man with a blue woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering, smiling and extending his right hand in a welcoming gesture. Soft warm golden light, serene and peaceful mood. Medium shot at eye level. Earthy, sandy, and turquoise palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
